name: Jb Hi-Fi Limited
analysis: JBH has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 30% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$79.9600. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$81.8400, stop A$73.4976, target A$92.3732 (1.26:1) — then trail it.
